narrative:
Center Twp township has 2,889 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.0 percentage points.
